description_long: This bungalow is a spacious, modern residential building with a prominent brown gabled roof and a mix of wood and concrete exterior walls. The front features a covered porch with wooden railings, a set of steps leading to the main entrance, and a well-maintained garden bordered by a low hedge. The rear of the property boasts a large swimming pool with a tiled deck, surrounded by trees and greenery, as well as a glass-enclosed sunroom or greenhouse. The property is enclosed by a brick and hedge fence, providing privacy and a sense of enclosure. Multiple windows of varying sizes are arranged asymmetrically across the facade, allowing ample natural light into the interior. The overall design blends modern and Craftsman elements, with functional outdoor spaces and a clear separation between living and recreational areas.
description: A modern bungalow with a brown gabled roof, covered porch, large windows, and a backyard pool, surrounded by a brick and hedge fence.
description_view_0: Front view showing the covered porch, main entrance, steps, and landscaped front garden.
description_view_1: Side/rear view highlighting the extended roof, upper balcony, and part of the backyard pool area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full swimming pool, tiled deck, trees, and glass-enclosed sunroom.
description_view_3: Side view featuring the sunroom, garden area, and the continuation of the gabled roof.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped and individual windows on multiple facades
